message:
🌱 Refactor: Adopt useCardData hook across 7 more card components (#181) (#244)

Phase 4c of the useCardData adoption. Converts 7 larger card components
from manual state management to the centralized useCardData hook.

Converted cards:
- ClusterCosts (869→715 lines)
- GitHubActivity (1251→1125 lines)
- NamespaceQuotas (973→870 lines)
- OPAPolicies (1619→1524 lines)
- StockMarketTicker (883→814 lines)
- UserManagement (965→751 lines)
- RSSFeed (rss/RSSFeed.tsx)

Also fixes a type import in RecentEvents.tsx (ClusterEvent from useMCP
instead of kubectlProxy to match the source data type).

Net reduction: ~186 lines (884 insertions, 1070 deletions)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
